testcase.name: test_get_user_stats_authenticated
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_v6.py:203: in test_get_user_stats_authenticated assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_global_jackpot

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('jackpot_amount' in {'contribution_per_bid': 1, 'current_amount': 100, 'is_active': True, 'last_winner': 'Albin', ...} or 'amount' in {'contribution_per_bid': 1, 'current_amount': 100, 'is_active': True, 'last_winner': 'Albin', ...} or 'current_jackpot' in {'contribution_per_bid': 1, 'current_amount': 100, 'is_active': True, 'last_winner': 'Albin', ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_v6.py:214: in test_get_global_jackpot assert "jackpot_amount" in data or "amount" in data or "current_jackpot" in data E AssertionError: assert ('jackpot_amount' in {'contribution_per_bid': 1, 'current_amount': 100, 'is_active': True, 'last_winner': 'Albin', ...} or 'amount' in {'contribution_per_bid': 1, 'current_amount': 100, 'is_active': True, 'last_winner': 'Albin', ...} or 'current_jackpot' in {'contribution_per_bid': 1, 'current_amount': 100, 'is_active': True, 'last_winner': 'Albin', ...})
